Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid username.
3. Enter the valid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in and redirected to the home page.

Title: Unsuccessful Login (Invalid Username)
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the invalid username.
3. Enter the valid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Preconditions: User has registered and is logged out.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid username.
3. Enter the invalid password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user remains on the login page.

Title: Successful Registration
Test Data: Valid username, valid email, valid password, and matching password confirmation.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the valid username.
3. Enter the valid email.
4. Enter the valid password.
5. Enter the matching password confirmation.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is registered, and a confirmation message is displayed.
